basic_details.job_title: NMPA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Manager, Chief Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Manager, Chief Manager and Senior Manager
basic_details.short_information: The New Mangalore Port Authority (NMPA) has officially announced the Manager, Chief Manager and Senior Manager Recruitment 2026 with 12 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40 years for Manager, 45 years for Senior Manager, and 55 years for Chief Manager, and hold First Class B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / IT, Degree in Law, Post Graduate Degree / MBA, or relevant recognized qualification can now submit their online applications from now until 16 May 2026. Direct links to download the notificat

age_limit.age_details: Chief Manager: 55 years, Senior Manager: 45 years, Manager: 40 years
age_limit.details: Chief Manager: Maximum 55 years Senior Manager: Maximum 45 years Manager: Maximum 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: First Class B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / relevant field of IT, Degree in Law, Post Graduate Degree in Environmental Science / Environmental Engineering or Environmental Law, Any recognized degree + Post Graduate Degree / MBA / equivalent
qualification.details: Chief Manager (ICT): First Class B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / relevant field of IT Chief Manager (Corporate Legal): Degree in Law Chief Manager (Business Development & Trade Promotion): Any recognized degree + Post Graduate Degree / MBA / equivalent Senior Manager (ICT): First Class B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / relevant field of IT Senior Manager (Corporate Legal): Degree in Law Senior Manager (Business Development & Trade Promotion): Any recognized degree + Post Graduate Degree / MBA / equivalent Manager (ICT): First Class B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / relevant field of IT Manager (Corporate Legal): Degree in Law Manager (Environment and Safety): Post Graduate Degree in Environmental Science / Environmental Engineering or Environmental Law Manager (Business Development & Trade Promotion): Any recognized degree + Post Graduate Degree / MBA / equivalent

salary_details.details: Chief Manager (ICT): Rs. 2,00,000 per month consolidated Chief Manager (Corporate Legal): Rs. 2,00,000 per month consolidated Chief Manager (Business Development & Trade Promotion): Rs. 2,00,000 per month consolidated Senior Manager (ICT): Rs. 1,60,000 per month consolidated Senior Manager (Corporate Legal): Rs. 1,60,000 per month consolidated Senior Manager (Business Development & Trade Promotion): Rs. 1,60,000 per month consolidated Manager (ICT): Rs. 1,20,000 per month consolidated Manager (Corporate Legal): Rs. 1,20,000 per month consolidated Manager (Environment and Safety): Rs. 1,20,000 per month consolidated Manager (Business Development & Trade Promotion): Rs. 1,20,000 per month consolidated

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification & experience Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NMPA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NMPA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NMPA Professional Functionaries recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NMPA Professional Functionaries recruitment is 16 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Professional Functionaries at NMPA?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies available for the Professional Functionaries posts at the New Mangalore Port Authority.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website of NMPA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Professional Functionaries posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 1,20,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 per month, depending on the specific post and designation.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Manager (ICT) post?
faq.answer: For the Manager (ICT) post, candidates must possess a First Class B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / relevant field of IT.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Chief Manager posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Manager posts is 55 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NMPA Professional Functionaries?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their qualification and experience, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee mentioned for the NMPA recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any application fee for the General/OBC category. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article by clicking on the provided link.
